prompt_messages.content: You generate weak candidate mechanism edges for industrial multivariate time-series models. Return only valid JSON. These edges are not causal truth; they are low-confidence candidates that must be validated by downstream experiments.

Propose feature-to-feature mechanism edges only from the allowed feature names. Avoid label targets, identifiers, duplicates, and generic correlations. Prefer edges that could explain propagation, thermal/flow/pressure/electrical coupling, or degradation dynamics. JSON input:
{"dataset": "skab", "target": "anomaly", "task": "binary point/run anomaly detection", "allowed_features": ["Accelerometer1RMS", "Accelerometer2RMS", "Current", "Pressure", "Temperature", "Thermocouple", "Voltage", "Volume Flow RateRMS"], "feature_catalog": [{"name": "Accelerometer1RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 31964}, {"name": "Accelerometer2RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 35252}, {"name": "Current", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 42271}, {"name": "Pressure", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 10}, {"name": "Temperature", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 37593}, {"name": "Thermocouple", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 24917}, {"name": "Voltage", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 26895}, {"name": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 1994}], "existing_candidate_edges": [{"source": "Current", "target": "Temperature", "relation": "motor_load_heating", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"source": "Voltage", "target": "Current", "relation": "drive_electrical_response", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"source": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "target": "Pressure", "relation": "flow_pressure_coupling", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"source": "Pressure", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "hydraulic_feedback", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"source": "Accelerometer1RMS", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "mechanical_vibration_flow", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"source": "Temperature", "target": "Thermocouple", "relation": "thermal_transfer", "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}], "max_edges": 8, "required_json_schema": {"edges": [{"source": "one allowed feature name", "target": "one allowed feature name", "relation": "short mechanism relation", "lag": "integer 0 to 5", "reliability": "float 0.05 to 0.55", "rationale": "one short falsifiable mechanism sentence"}]}}
